response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics of 'Night of Fire' perfectly match the English lyrics in the reference. '灰色の証明' was manually transcribed based on the performance.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics of 'Night of Fire' provided in the reference were fully utilized and aligned to the vocal timestamps. The monologue from 00:55 to 03:42 was transcribed and translated manually, and the Japanese song '灰色の証明' was transcribed manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly timed to match the vocal track, using aggressive truncation for transitions and accurate grouping for the monologue to ensure smooth reading.

subtitles.english: Come over the top, you've never been here

subtitles.english: You better begin the prayer to play

subtitles.english: Night of fire, come on, come over me

subtitles.original: Come over the top, you'll have a night of fire
subtitles.english: Come over the top, you'll have a night of fire

subtitles.original: You'll have a night of fire
subtitles.english: You'll have a night of fire

subtitles.original: ということで、ここまでたくさんの！
subtitles.english: With that, we've had so many...

subtitles.original: 本当たくさんのゲストさんたちと、歌って踊ってきましたが、いかがだったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: really, so many guests join us to sing and dance, how did you like it?

subtitles.original: 楽しんでますかー？
subtitles.english: Are you having fun?

subtitles.original: なかなかね、こんなにホロメンが集まることってないので、もう本当、生誕祭、お祭りって感じで嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Since it's rare for so many Holomembers to gather like this, I'm really happy, it feels like a real festival for my birthday!

subtitles.original: ゲストさんたちにも、大きな拍手をー！
subtitles.english: Let's give a big round of applause to our guests as well!

subtitles.original: ありがとう、みんなー！ゲストのみんな、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone! Thank you to all the guests!

subtitles.original: いや、このね、鏡のモニターから登場するという演出をやってみたいなと思って
subtitles.english: I really wanted to try having guests appear from these mirror monitors,

subtitles.original: アイドルとスウィーツパレードで実現していただきました！
subtitles.english: and they made it happen during "Idol" and "Sweets Parade"!

subtitles.original: あの、わためいと、スバル先輩、エルフレ先輩たちが、ペンライトをね、振ってくれてたのも可愛かったし
subtitles.english: Also, it was cute how the Watamates, Subaru-senpai, and Elfriends were waving penlights for us,

subtitles.original: やっぱりホロメンって可愛いよなー！
subtitles.english: and indeed, Holomembers are so cute!

subtitles.original: あと、「ようこそジャパリパークへ」ではサバンナで肉食動物たちに囲まれて、虎のような人間がいたような気もしますが
subtitles.english: Also, in "Welcome to Japari Park", we were surrounded by carnivores in the savanna, and I felt like there was a tiger-like human there...

subtitles.original: みんながね、仲良くなっていく様子を表現させていただきました！
subtitles.english: ...but we wanted to express how everyone became good friends!

subtitles.original: まあ、ちょっとね、最後みんなの表情怪しかったけどね
subtitles.english: Well, everyone's expressions at the end were a bit suspicious, though!

subtitles.original: そして、Night of Fire！これはもう、英語の上手なEN・IDメンバーのみんなと一緒に歌いたいと思って<
subtitles.english: And "Night of Fire"! I wanted to sing this with the EN and ID members who are fluent in English,

subtitles.original: 横に立って歌っても浮かないように、英語頑張んだんだけど、大丈夫だったかな？海外ニキ！
subtitles.english: so I worked hard on my English so I wouldn't stand out standing next to them. Was it okay, overseas bros?!

subtitles.original: うんうん、「英語上手」「英語上手」ってコメントが来てると思う！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, I'm sure comments like "Your English is good" are coming in! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: でも、みんなもっと気になるところがね、あったかなと思うんですが
subtitles.english: But I think there might be something else everyone is curious about...

subtitles.original: あ、車ね！攻めてたね！
subtitles.english: Oh, the car! That was quite bold, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: あとは、パラパラ踊るギリ割るロボね！
subtitles.english: And also the Guriwaru Robot dancing parapara!

subtitles.original: やりたい放題させていただいて、とっても楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: I got to do whatever I wanted, and it was so much fun!

subtitles.original: でも！まだ終わりじゃない！
subtitles.english: But! It's not over yet!

subtitles.original: ちょっと着替えてくるので、待っててください！
subtitles.english: I'm going to go change, so please wait a moment!

subtitles.original: よいしょ、よいしょ。よいしょ、よいしょ。着替えて、着替えて、よいしょ、よいしょ。ふぅ、はぁ
subtitles.english: Yoisho, yoisho... changing, changing... phew, haa...

subtitles.original: あ、もう着替え終わった！
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm already done changing!

subtitles.original: えー、さて、次の曲なんですが
subtitles.english: Now then, as for the next song...

subtitles.original: なんと、なんかみんなもう知ってそうだけど、次の曲は新曲！
subtitles.english: Incredibly, though it seems everyone already knows, the next song is a brand new song!

subtitles.original: 「灰色の証明」をやります！
subtitles.english: I will be performing "Grey Proof"!

subtitles.original: わためチャンネルにてMV公開中なので、MVもぜひ見てください！
subtitles.english: The MV is currently out on the Watame Channel, so please check it out too!

subtitles.original: そして、楽曲リリースもしているので、いいなと思ったら、ぜひ買ってください！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: And since the digital single is also released, if you like it, please buy it! Thank you!

subtitles.original: では、新曲「灰色の証明」、魂を込めて歌います。聴いてください
subtitles.english: Now, my new song "Grey Proof". I will sing it with all my soul. Please listen to it.

subtitles.original: 静寂に包まれた
subtitles.english: Wrapped in silence...

subtitles.original: ゼロ地点の感情を
subtitles.english: the emotion at ground zero...

subtitles.original: 期待を背負っているのは
subtitles.english: Because the one carrying expectations...

subtitles.original: 私ではないから
subtitles.english: is not me.

subtitles.original: 主人公はいつだって
subtitles.english: The protagonist is always...

subtitles.original: 輝いている誰かで
subtitles.english: someone who shines,

subtitles.original: 見上げるだけじゃ何も変わらない
subtitles.english: and just looking up won't change anything.

subtitles.original: 今この時だけの
subtitles.english: With a temporary advantage...

subtitles.original: 瞬間的な優位性で 駆け抜けて
subtitles.english: that is only for this very moment, run through!

subtitles.original: 灰色の空 裂いて
subtitles.english: Tear open the grey sky,

subtitles.original: 私の全てを
subtitles.english: with all of me...

subtitles.original: 運命のシナリオに
subtitles.english: slam against the scenario of fate...

subtitles.original: 叩きつけて打ち砕け
subtitles.english: and shatter it!

subtitles.original: 自信は微塵もない
subtitles.english: I don't have a shred of confidence,

subtitles.original: あるのは渇望だけ
subtitles.english: all I have is craving.

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を証明しよう
subtitles.english: I'll just prove my own existence,

subtitles.original: 此処にいたことを刻むように
subtitles.english: as if engraving the fact that I was "here".
